info.title: Para API
info.description: Para is an open-source, general-purpose, backend framework/server for the cloud. It provides CRUD operations for any type of object, full-text search, authentication, and more.

tags.name: Objects
tags.description: Generic CRUD operations on Para objects

parameters.name: provider
parameters.description: Identity provider (facebook, google, github, ldap, etc.)

parameters.name: method
parameters.description: HTTP method or list of methods

get.summary: Get current authenticated user or app
get.description: Get current authenticated user or app

get.summary: Get any object by full ID
get.description: Get any object by full ID

get.summary: Initialize app or get admin credentials
get.description: Initialize app or get admin credentials

signedAuth.description: AWS Signature V4 signed request or JWT Bearer token
